person.name: William de Morville I
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
William de Morville was born circa 1180 at Wraxall, Long Ashton, Somerset, England.

In 1226-8, William de Morville held Bradpole by sergeanty of making summons and paying 11s rent by hand of the sheriff.

On 9 December, 1235, Eudo de Morville had made fine with the king by 25 marks for having seisin of the manor of Bridport, which William de Morville, his father, held of the king in chief by sergeanty, with the hundred of Redhone and the foreign hundred of Beaminster, which fell to Eudo by hereditary right, and the king had taken his homage for this. Order to the sheriff of Dorset that, having accepted security from Eudo for the aforesaid 25 marks to the king's use, he was to cause him to have full seisin of the manor of Bridport, the hundred of Redhone and the foreign hundred of Beaminster.

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Morville I於1180年出生在英國多瑟特福拉薩爾時，他的父親Eudes de Morville30歲，母親Elizabeth de Wrokeshale25歲。他於1209年與Actina de Witt of Bradpole在英國英格蘭多瑟特布利波特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1228年在英國薩默塞特朗 艾希頓享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Morville I于1180年出生在英国多瑟特福拉薩爾时，他的父亲Eudes de Morville30岁，母亲Elizabeth de Wrokeshale25岁。他于1209年与Actina de Witt of Bradpole在英国英格兰多瑟特布利波特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1228年在英国薩默塞特朗 艾希頓享年48岁。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Morville I was born in 1180, in Wraxall, Dorset, England, his father, Eudes de Morville, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth de Wrokeshale, was 25. He married Actina de Witt of Bradpole in 1209, in Bridport, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1228, in Long Ashton, Somerset, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Morville I est né en 1180, à Wraxall, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Eudes de Morville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Wrokeshale, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Actina de Witt of Bradpole en 1209, à Bridport, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1228, à Long Ashton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Morville I 1180 in Wraxall, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes de Morville 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Wrokeshale 25. Er hat 1209 in Bridport, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Actina de Witt of Bradpole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1228 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Long Ashton, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Morville I è nato il nel 1180 nel Wraxall, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Eudes de Morville, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Wrokeshale, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Actina de Witt of Bradpole nel 1209, nel Bridport, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1228, nel Long Ashton, Somerset, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Morville Iが1180年にイギリスドールセトウラクサルで生まれた時，父Eudes de Morvilleは30歳，母Elizabeth de Wrokeshaleは25歳であった。1209年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリドプオルトでActina de Witt of Bradpoleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1228年にイギリスソメルセトロング アシュトンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Morville I(이)가 1180년 영국 도르세트 라스알에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes de Morville(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Wrokeshale(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1209년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브리드포트에서 Actina de Witt of Bradpole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1228년 영국 서머세트 론그 애슈턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Morville I nasceu em 1180, em Wraxall, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eudes de Morville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Wrokeshale, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Actina de Witt of Bradpole em 1209, em Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1228, em Long Ashton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Morville I родился в 1180 г. в местности раксалл, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Eudes de Morville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Wrokeshale, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Actina de Witt of Bradpole в 1209 г. в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1228 г. в местности лонг аштон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Morville I nació en 1180, en Wraxall, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Eudes de Morville, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Wrokeshale, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Actina de Witt of Bradpole en 1209, en Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1228, en Long Ashton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
